---
title: Programming Cafe; tbd
subtitle: "15:00 - 17:00"
date: "09 June 2026"
author: "UDCC"
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Taught by"
  title-block-published: "Date"
categories:
  - HPC
image: ../img/icons8-cafe-64.png
image-alt: "data center"
execute: 
  cache: true
  freeze: true
---

The Programming cafe is an informal monthly meetup facilitated by RDM Support. Each Programming cafe has a special theme, and in June the theme will be very much related to the HPC Spring School!

<!-- <a href="https://www.uu.nl/en/events/programming-cafe-15-may-2025" class="button">More Information!</a> -->
